scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: npm run --prefix server dev & npm run --prefix client dev
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run --prefix server && npm run test:run --prefix client
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix server && npm run test:coverage --prefix client
